channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Reform UK leader Farage faces parliamentary probe over nearly $7m gift
item.description: If found guilty, the right-wing populist could be suspended from the House ⁠of Commons for a period of time.

item.title: LIVE: Manchester City vs Crystal Palace – Premier League
item.description: Follow our live build-up with full team news coverage ahead of our text commentary stream.

item.title: France confines over 1,700 passengers on cruise ship over gastroenteritis
item.description: The British ship docked in the southwestern French city of Bordeaux reports 49 suspected cases.

item.title: Trump arrives in China for two-day summit with Xi
item.description: US President Donald Trump has landed in Beijing to meet China’s President Xi Jinping.

item.title: 12 killed by a series of Israeli strikes on cars in Lebanon
item.description: A series of Israeli strikes on vehicles in Lebanon killed at least 12 people, including a woman and her two children.

item.title: What Trump and Xi want from China visit
item.description: Tensions over trade, technology, Taiwan, and the war on Iran are set to dominate high-stakes talks between Trump and Xi.

item.title: ‘Most powerful’: What’s the Sarmat missile Russia has test-launched?
item.description: President Vladimir Putin claims the RS-28 Sarmat's range is far beyond Western estimates.

item.title: Which teams have won the FIFA World Cup?
item.description: Ahead of the World Cup 2026, a chronological record of all winners since the first global tournament took place in 1930.

item.title: Amid US-Israel war on Iran, Arizona awaits Iranian team before World Cup
item.description: Sports facility and football fans in the city of Tucson want Iran's players to feel 'safe and welcome'.

item.title: Japan suspends Australian rugby coach Jones for verbally abusing officials
item.description: Eddie Jones suspended for four games over 'verbal abuse' of officials during Australian tour.

item.title: Could South Africa’s Ramaphosa be impeached over ‘cash-in-sofa’ scandal?
item.description: South African president came to power on anticorruption mandate - and could go now for stuffing cash in furniture.

item.title: Trump needs Xi much more than Xi needs Trump
item.description: As the Iran war reshapes global power dynamics, Beijing enters the Trump-Xi summit with more leverage over Washington.

item.title: Why Trump decided to back Iraq’s prime minister-designate, Ali al-Zaidi
item.description: Support from Washington is conditional on clear progress in curbing pro-Iran militia activity.

item.title: Gunshots ring out at Philippine Senate where lawmaker is holed up
item.description: Ronald dela Rosa, former police chief under ex-President Rodrigo Duterte, faces an ICC arrest warrant.

item.title: Activist confronts Iran’s former crown prince over war on Iran
item.description: Activist confronts Iran’s former crown prince over war on Iran

item.title: Israeli attacks on Gaza increased by 35% since Iran ceasefire: Report
item.description: Conflict monitor ACLED notes the increase in Israeli attacks on Gaza in April in its latest report.

item.title: Key Zelenskyy aides under corruption cloud: What are they accused of?
item.description: Andriy Yermak, Zelenskyy’s ex-aide, faces $10.5m corruption charges tied to a luxury real estate project near Kyiv.

item.title: Maldives jails two journalists for reporting on president’s alleged affair
item.description: Rights groups condemn jailing of journalists for violating a gag order on allegations against President Mohamed Muizzu.

item.title: Trump faces slew of ‘bad options’ on Iran as diplomacy falters
item.description: Trump faces mounting pressure amid stalled Iran peace talks as domestic discontent grows and geopolitical stakes rise.

item.title: UN urges independent probes into deadly Nigeria, Chad air attacks
item.description: UN rights chief 'shocked' by reports that Nigerian and Chadian forces killed over 100 civilians and seeks inquiries.

item.title: Israel bulldozes Palestinian shops to make way for settlement-linked road
item.description: Israel bulldozes Palestinian shops to make way for settlement-linked road

item.title: Gang violence displaces hundreds in Haiti’s capital
item.description: People in Cite Soleil neighbourhood of Port-au-Prince protest as gang violence shuts hospitals and displaces hundreds.

item.title: Video: Putin hails test launch of ‘world’s most powerful missile’
item.description: Russia has test-fired a new weapon that President Putin has described as the world’s ‘most powerful’ missile.

item.title: At least eight killed in Israeli drone strikes on Lebanon highway
item.description: Two children among those killed after three strikes hit cars on the highway in Jiyeh, south of Beirut.

item.title: The class politics of modern outbreaks
item.description: The MV Hondius hantavirus scare revived debates about luxury travel, public health and unequal vulnerability to disease.
